customer_message: how to create a test upgrade request , i need a fresh test database
company_response:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out.

It sounds like you may be looking for steps on how to generate a new test request. You can refer to this guide for instructions on creating an upgrade request: https://www.odoo.com/documentation/19.0/administration/upgrade.html

Alternatively, we can create a v19 test database for you directly and send you the link. Please let us know if you would like us to proceed with that.

If you are instead encountering a different issue, please provide more specific details. A screenshot or video recording showing the error and how to reproduce it would be very helpful for our investigation.

Best regards,
Ark Patel
